text: OLIPOP confirmed expansion to 50 new Target doors in Southwest. Need field execution plan this week.
Vintage Cola SKU running 23% ahead of velocity targets in Southwest. Strong momentum.
3 Sprouts locations flagged for non-compliance after promo reset. Sending field team Monday.
Guayaki SKU count dropped at 8 Natural Grocers doors. Need recovery plan before QBR call.
Austin Whole Foods is top velocity door for Guayaki. Store manager relationship is strong.
Compliance dipped this quarter. 11 stores flagged in Repsly. Summer reset timing caused issues.
Nixie is one of our fastest growing brands. Coverage up 22% this quarter alone.
Southeast Sprouts expansion on track. 28 of 40 doors onboarded. Remaining 12 by end of month.
Nixie brand team asking about Midwest expansion feasibility for Q1 2026. Big opportunity.
C20 brand team asking hard questions about compliance drop. Need clear explanation before Friday.
Vita Coco and Harmless Harvest gained shelf space at Walmart this quarter. May be affecting C20.
HEB and Kroger doors holding well for C20. Problem seems concentrated in Walmart channel.
Honey Stinger at 93% shelf compliance. Highest in our entire portfolio this quarter.
New Organic Waffle SKU launching October. Field team needs briefing and planogram slots reserved.
Honey Stinger brand team wants to expand into grocery channel. Target and Whole Foods. Major opportunity.
